author: kawaho
body:
Adding the decay table created by Belle2 clones from the EvtGen v03.00.00 repo. The decay table includes specialized models implemented by Belle2 and added in the official EvtGen v03.00.00. This is the same table that EvtGen authors recommend and that ATLAS uses by default [1].

Notice this decay table ONLY works with >= EvtGen v03.00.00

[1]: https://indico.cern.ch/event/1424475/contributions/6003355/attachments/2879140/5059857/LHC_HFWG_ATLAS_Jun2024.pdf
title: Belle2 decay table for EvtGen v3
